questions.query_text: In the Kong/kong releases, which release is described as a patch release to cover CVE-2023-44487?
Across the Kong/kong releases, how does the content of release 3.4.2 differ from release 3.4.1?

options.text: 3.4.2 is a patch release to cover CVE-2023-44487, while 3.4.1 only provides download links and a changelog reference.
3.4.2 introduces a new plugin, while 3.4.1 fixes a memory leak.
Both releases are identical in content.
3.4.2 removes the changelog link, while 3.4.1 includes it.

questions.expected_answer: 3.4.2 is a patch release to cover CVE-2023-44487, while 3.4.1 only provides download links and a changelog reference.

answer_support.answer_text: provides download links and a changelog reference

questions.query_text: In the Kong/kong release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that provides download links and a changelog reference for version 2.8.0, (2) a release that provides download links and a changelog reference for version 3.0.0, (3) a release that is a patch release to cover CVE-2023-44487.

answer_support.answer_text: provides download links and a changelog reference for version 2.8.0
provides download links and a changelog reference for version 3.0.0
